task:
<environment>
Browser is headless: yes
Uses existing browser cookies: no
Scope: Changes
Current branch: main
Main branch: main
</environment>

<developer_request>
Aggressively test the WYSIWYG Markdown editor on http://localhost:5173?file=demo. This is a TipTap-based editor. DO NOT just check that things render — actually interact deeply: 1) Select text in the editor and try bold (Cmd+B), italic (Cmd+I), and strikethrough — verify the bubble menu appears on text selection with formatting options. 2) Try undo (Cmd+Z) and redo (Cmd+Shift+Z) after making changes — verify they work correctly. 3) Type '/' on an empty line to trigger slash commands — verify the slash command menu appears with options like heading, bullet list, code block. Select one and verify it inserts correctly. 4) Try heading cycling with Cmd+Shift+Up and Cmd+Shift+Down on a heading — verify it cycles through H1/H2/H3. 5) Create a bullet list, add 3 items, then try to indent a sub-item with Tab. 6) Select all text (Cmd+A) and delete it, then undo to restore. 7) Report every bug, broken interaction, or unexpected behavior you find.
</developer_request>

<scope_strategy>
- Treat committed and uncommitted work as one body of change.
- Cover the requested flow first, then the highest-risk adjacent flows.
- Test 2-4 follow-up flows, prioritizing paths that share components or data with the changed files.
- If the changes touch shared utilities or layouts, verify multiple pages that use them.
</scope_strategy>
